{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322023745DB3FEB89D8A1AA4C0E4F"}"},"total":1490},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614341690404602648","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《怪兽多拉考也有成王梦》这本写得很踏实，没有无脑爽，也不强行开挂，主角从一只普通怪兽一步步成长，剧情合理，节奏也稳。世界观和设定都挺有意思，人物不崩，看着很舒服，喜欢怪兽成长类的可以看看，确实值得五星。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772855325,"group_id":"7411090294411643929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"所谓开拓，就是沿着前人未尽的道路继续前行","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/kF/SUQIlcMWsDZW4ei+5Q3TsUiOuYBTeenVcD+OE69","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ff46f215555440818daee933bb845b6b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704535&x-signature=XmqnnlAb8ak3qw%2BlJTtskIpebqI%3D","user_id":"1786052732010268","user_name":"陈星老师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1786052732010268","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411090294411643929","book_info":{"abstract":"【非传统奥文】【另类打开视角】【脑洞奥文】【前期刻写主角，后期群像】
因为意外穿越到奥特世界，灵魂在穿越的过程中和彗星相撞，成为了初代登场彗星怪兽多拉考，作为怪兽，艾辛他本不想进入地球送菜，但奈何多拉考的灵魂和他还没融合完成，他并不能完全操控怪兽的躯体，只能眼睁睁的看着身体跟随本能的指引，向地球飞去……

        原本以为死定了，就算不被雷德王打死，也要被初代奥特曼宰了。
        但是，濒死的时候，事情迎来了转机！
        ……
        一个黑洞出现在变成多拉考的艾辛面前，巨大的引力将它和雷德王拉入其中……陷入了一场，更大的危机！
（怪兽，不化形，反派阵营……）
（也是写到这么多了，本作者也来说说吧，这本和其他奥文不一样，可以当成许多本同人来看，因为里面的设定随便拿出来都可以开一本新奥文，超银河帝国时期，平成三杰时期，雷奥尼克斯之星时期，新生代时期......我的设定都很新颖，进来保证不亏，就是牢艾偶尔吃亏）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3de391cc92dafc63aa248e84148dee59","author":"黑天夜猫子","author_id":"","book_id":"7411090294411643929","book_name":"奥特宇宙生存指南","book_short_name":"雷奥尼克斯星","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281018","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7421092669046129177","read_count":"45338","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2053782"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"988","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,反派,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/08c572c0664032365dd98e8697acbf84~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302265&x-signature=Nk6ZIpsjetyLo%2BjHU3UPmR%2B1dAE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4084029463465996","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"103"},"log_extra e_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411090294411643929","book_info":{"abstract":"【非传统奥文】【另类打开视角】【脑洞奥文】【前期刻写主角，后期群像】

        原本以为死定了，就算不被雷德王打死，也要被初代奥特曼宰了。
        但是，濒死的时候，事情迎来了转机！
